message:
test(aggregator): wave 29 – 18 data-type trait tests for transport aggregator

Cover PathId, PathState, PathCharacteristics, PathSelectionPolicy,
PathSetStats, DeduplicatorConfig/Stats, ReordererConfig/Stats,
AggregatorConfig, AggregationError, ProcessResult, TransportPath
state transitions and zero-stats rate accessors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
